meta.name: Alien: Isolation
meta.desc: Fifteen years after the events of Ridley Scott's Alien Ellen Ripley's daughter Amanda is looking for answers. She is an engineer working for Weiland-Yutani Corporation. When she finds out that the logs from USCSS Nostromo have been located and transported to Sevastopol space station she decides to join a small crew sent by Weiland-Yutani to retrieve the data. Little does she know that the ship that has found the logs reached Sevastopol with a terrifying passenger on board, the one that murdered the majority of station's population and left the survivors cowering in fear.

meta.name: Deadpool
meta.desc:
Deadpool es un juego de acción en tercera persona protagonizado por Wade Wilson, el mercenario bocazas conocido como Deadpool, que rompe constantemente la cuarta pared y mezcla humor con violencia exagerada.
Durante un encargo para asesinar a un magnate mediático corrupto, Mister Sinister interviene y acaba matando a Deadpool, lo que provoca que este jure vengarse, solo para descubrir un complot mayor que amenaza a toda la humanidad. Con la ayuda de varios X‑Men como Wolverine, Rogue y Domino, además de su camarada del futuro Cable, se enfrenta a Mister Sinister y a sus Marauders, entre ellos Arclight, Blockbuster y Vertigo, para frustrar sus planes.

meta.name: DOOM
meta.desc: Doom on PC is a reboot of id Software's cult classic, drawing on the style of the first two installments. You play as a Marine forced to repel a demon invasion on Mars, using an arsenal ranging from shotguns to rocket launchers.

meta.name: Fallout
meta.desc:
Set in the aftermath of a world-wide nuclear war, Fallout will challenge you to survive in an unknown and dangerous world. You will take the role of a Vault-dweller, a person who has grown up in a secluded, underground survival Vault. Circumstances arise that force you to go Outside - to a strange world 80 years after the end of modern civilization. A world of mutants, radiation, gangs and violence.
Your immediate task is to find a replacement for the broken water purification controller chip. Without that chip, your fellow Vault dwellers are doomed to dehydration or will be forced to leave the safety of the Vault for the Outside.
The core of the game revolves around your character. Fallout uses a skill-based system to allow you to fine tune your character. As you gain experience (roughly half from combat, the other half from solving adventure seeds and non-combat events), your character will grow as you determine. Combat in Fallout is tactical turn-based. You can take as much time as you need to make decisions. Choose from different types of attacks, with a variety of weapons and attack skills.

meta.name: Iron Man
meta.desc: As the official adaptation of the film, Iron Man on PC captures the key moments seen on the big screen. Donning the metallic armor of the superhero, the player can rely on the incredible speed and firepower of his suit to traverse the levels of this action game.

meta.name: Portal
meta.desc: En Portal, el jugador controla a un personaje llamado Chell en una vista en primera persona que debe atravesar una serie de habitaciones utilizando un generador de portales. Este generador crea dos portales distintos, uno naranja y otro azul, en una superficie plana de partículas lunares. Ninguno de ellos es necesariamente la entrada o la salida, y cualquier objeto que pase por un portal saldrá por el otro, manteniendo su velocidad. Los portales no pueden crearse en todas las superficies, pero un intento fallido de crear un portal no afectará a los portales ya creados. El jugador también puede recoger objetos, pero no puede lanzarlos a larga distancia. Estos objetos, a menudo cubos de almacenamiento, pueden utilizarse para pulsar interruptores que activen plataformas o abran puertas, o para protegerse del fuego de las torretas, pero estos cubos no pueden llevarse de una habitación a otra.

meta.name: Spider-Man
meta.desc:
Spider-Man is the first 3D game to star the popular web-slinger.  It is loosely based on Spider-Man: The Animated Series and Spider-Man Unlimited and features some of the voice cast from each and similar character designs.
Peter Parker is attending a demonstration of the reformed Dr. Otto Octavius's new invention when an imposter Spider-Man steals the device.  Spider-Man must work to clear his name and uncover the sinister motives behind the device's theft.
This game features appearances not only by most major Spider-Man characters, but cameos by numerous other characters from the Marvel Universe, such as the Human Torch, Punisher, Daredevil and Captain America.

meta.name: Walking Dead, The
meta.desc: Inspired by the comic book of the same name, The Walking Dead: Season 1 on PC is an adventure game set in a world where people are turning into zombies following an unknown infection. The player takes on the role of Lee, a surviving prisoner who takes young Clementine under his wing to help her find her parents.
